violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. > Upstairs: cases of bread and bag of flour on floor; case of white queso setting on top of beer keg > Downstairs: Boxed beverages on floor; soda rack setting directly below drain lines; cases of food on the floor in entryway.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Clothes for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses.
General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Reusing cardboard boxes for single service cups, boxes are dirty.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as needed. > Cutting board top/bottom on prep cooler > Interior of microwave dirty
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer containers for 3-compartment sink and for mechanical dishmachine were empty; kitchenware not being sanitized between uses.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Wait area: untensil tray was over-filled and jumbled up. Eating surfaces not aligned so handles only available to workers.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service paper goods are not stored to be protected from contamination. > closet across from RR - paper towels and toilet tissue on the floor > Basement: case of foam cups beneath drain lines

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. > Hot water at kitchen and restroom handwash sinks tested at 130 F. Adjust between 110-120 F. to prevent scalding.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Disposable towels not provided at kitchen or restroom handwash sinks.
Service/janitor's sink. — --Mop/uutility sink was not provided for disposal of waste water.
Toilet facilities. — --One bathroom does not have a self-closing door.
Storage areas for refuse, recyclables, and returnables. — --Grease collection tank just delivered today. > Empty buckets of grease that have accumulated in the garbage enclosure into the tank.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc.)were not clean or not in good repair. > Wait area: clean wall above counter where plastic bins are located > kitchen ceiling need cleaning > repair damaged bar/kitchen flooring where damaged, hard to clean
Lighting. — --Replace missing light bulbs in fixtures in dish area, insufficient illumination.
Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Clothing were on kitchen floor by walk-in cooler and on top of main electrical switch box.
General premises. — --Organize storage areas: basement rooms, closet across from bathrooms.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Unlabeled spray bottles of unknown liquids were on the premises,was not clearly identified to indicated contents: closet across from restrooms, in bar tray with syrups.
